No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: The course is for graduate students, focusing on advanced statistical methods, cutting-edge research, and skill development, directly supporting quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and relevant skills for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 拓展研究生對統計學各領域前沿議題的理解與視野
培養學術思辨能力與研究興趣
to equip with the ability of theoretical derivation for advanced statistical methods

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops advanced statistical skills and inspires career planning, contributing to higher economic productivity through innovation and skilled employment, aligning with Target 8.2.
evidence: familiar with the application and practices of advanced statistical methods
激發研究問題意識與生涯規劃靈感

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances scientific research and innovation by exploring cutting-edge statistical topics and inspiring research questions, aligning strongly with Target 9.5.
evidence: 拓展研究生對統計學各領域前沿議題的理解與視野

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to marine life or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly aims to cultivate professional and research ethics, which is a foundational element for developing effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: 強化研究倫理與專業素養

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course explicitly fosters international academic exchange and knowledge sharing by inviting domestic and foreign scholars for lectures, directly supporting Target 17.6 on scientific cooperation.
evidence: 透過邀請國內外學者蒞校進行學術演講
